findings.description: Helmet sets important HTTP security headers (X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, HSTS, CSP, etc.). Without it the app is missing baseline browser-level protections. (Heuristic: no helmet() call found in scanned Node.js files.)
findings.recommendation: npm install helmet  and add app.use(helmet()) in your Express app setup.

findings.rule_name: JSON body parser has no size limit
findings.description: express.json() or bodyParser.json() is configured without a size limit. An attacker can send arbitrarily large request bodies, exhausting server memory and causing denial of service.
findings.recommendation: Set an explicit body size limit: app.use(express.json({ limit: '10kb' }))
